mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate reduces the equity discount rate and lifts risk appetite, so lower policy rates predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal is strongest when CPIAUCSL is not accelerating, because easing into stable inflation supports multiples rather than recession fears.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not higher after declining FEDFUNDS than after flat or rising FEDFUNDS, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in UNRATE above its recent level signals weakening household income and higher recession probability, which should pressure equities lower over the next month. The effect is directional when unemployment is rising faster than payroll growth is slowing.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the signal has no incremental predictive power once PAYEMS is controlled for.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and HOUST both strengthen, it implies broad demand growth in consumer spending and housing activity, which supports earnings expectations and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The mechanism fails when the demand pickup occurs alongside sharp policy tightening that offsets growth expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-growth state of RSAFS and HOUST does not outperform the marginal effect of each series alone, or if 60-day returns are not positive in the top-quartile joint-growth regime.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in INDPRO relative to GDP weakness indicates inventory rebuilding and improving industrial supply conditions, which should support cyclical equities over a one-month horizon. The signal is negative only when production rises because of inflationary overheating rather than real output growth.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises faster than GDPC1 over the latest available readings
failure_condition: Reject if periods with improving INDPRO versus GDPC1 do not show above-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if the relationship disappears after controlling for monetary policy.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above a restrictive threshold compresses equity valuations and increases the probability of growth disappointment, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The signal is most informative when inflation remains elevated rather than falling quickly.
failure_condition: Reject if the high-rate regime does not produce lower-than-average 20-day SPX returns, or if the signal flips sign when CPIAUCSL is stable.

mechanism_narrative: Rising PAYEMS together with a low UNRATE indicates robust labor demand and income growth, which should support equity returns over the next week through stronger near-term consumption expectations. The mechanism fails when payroll gains are concentrated in a deteriorating labor market with rising unemployment.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-UNRATE state does not improve 5-day forward returns relative to standalone payroll or unemployment effects, or if the sign is not positive in at least 55% of the high-employment episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A slowdown in GDPC1 growth signals softer aggregate demand and lower forward earnings revisions, which should weigh on S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The effect is strongest after growth has slowed for multiple consecutive observations, not on a single noisy print.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth is negative or decelerating for 2 consecutive quarterly observations
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive GDPC1 slowdowns do not precede negative 60-day SPX returns more often than chance, or if the rolling 3-year hit rate falls below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO improves while HOUST remains weak, the market reads the pattern as supply-side resilience without broad final-demand support, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal fails if both indicators rise together, because then the move is a broad recovery rather than a margin pressure regime.
failure_condition: Reject if the INDPRO-up/HOUST-down state does not underperform the unconditional 20-day SPX return distribution, or if the sign becomes positive when HOUST is rising.
